operator_instances.transformation_goal: Require format detection by content when file extension is missing or unrecognized.
operator_instances.rationale: The seed implementation relies solely on file extension, which is not robust. Adding content-based detection increases data handling complexity.

output_requirements: If the file extension is not .tsv/.txt/.yaml/.yml, the function must attempt format detection by content before raising ParseError.

new_hidden_tests.description: TSV file with no recognized extension, content should be detected as TSV and parsed successfully.

semantic_test_specs.semantic_intent: Verify that parse_exchange_file can detect TSV format by content when file extension is missing.
semantic_test_specs.target_constraint: When file extension is not .tsv/.txt/.yaml/.yml, the function must attempt to detect format by reading the first line.
semantic_test_specs.expected_failure_mode: The seed implementation would raise ParseError because resolve_format returns None.

input_variant.value: TSV content in a file without recognized extension

semantic_test_specs.test_case_description: A TSV file named 'data.txt' with correct header and data should be parsed successfully.

output_requirements: Scaled executable cases must expose the requirement for content-based format detection.

operator_instances.transformation_goal: Require detection of duplicate compound entries and raise ParseError.
operator_instances.rationale: Exchange files should have unique compound names. Adding duplicate detection enforces data integrity and increases algorithmic complexity.

output_requirements: If any compound name appears more than once in the file, raise ParseError.

new_hidden_tests.description: TSV file with two lines having the same compound name 'Glucose', should raise ParseError.

semantic_test_specs.semantic_intent: Verify that parse_exchange_file raises ParseError when a compound appears more than once.
semantic_test_specs.target_constraint: The function must track seen compounds and raise ParseError on duplicates.
semantic_test_specs.expected_failure_mode: The seed implementation yields all entries without checking duplicates, so it would succeed, not raise error.
semantic_test_specs.test_case_description: A TSV file with duplicate 'Glucose' entries should cause ParseError.

output_requirements: Scaled executable cases must expose the requirement for duplicate detection.

operator_instances.transformation_goal: Add robustness against malformed lines and mislabeled file extensions.
operator_instances.rationale: The seed implementation silently skips malformed lines and uses extension-only detection. Adding strict validation and content detection prevents shortcuts and increases adversarial robustness.

output_requirements: If a TSV file has a line with fewer or more than 3 tab-separated fields, raise ParseError.
If a YAML file has a line with fewer than 3 colon-separated fields, raise ParseError.
If the file extension is misleading (e.g., .txt but contains YAML), the function must correctly parse based on content.

new_hidden_tests.description: TSV file with a line missing a field should raise ParseError.
YAML file with a line having only 2 colon-separated fields should raise ParseError.
YAML content in a .txt file (which extension suggests TSV) should be correctly parsed as YAML.

semantic_test_specs.semantic_intent: Verify that parse_exchange_file raises ParseError for malformed TSV lines.
semantic_test_specs.target_constraint: Any TSV line that does not have exactly 3 tab-separated fields must raise ParseError.
semantic_test_specs.expected_failure_mode: The seed implementation silently skips malformed lines, so it would not raise an error.

input_variant.value: TSV file with a line missing a field

semantic_test_specs.test_case_description: A TSV file with a line having only 2 fields should cause ParseError.

semantic_test_specs.semantic_intent: Verify that parse_exchange_file raises ParseError for malformed YAML lines.
semantic_test_specs.target_constraint: Any YAML line that does not have at least 3 colon-separated fields must raise ParseError.
semantic_test_specs.expected_failure_mode: The seed implementation silently skips malformed lines, so it would not raise an error.

input_variant.value: YAML file with a line having only 2 fields

semantic_test_specs.test_case_description: A YAML file with a line having only 2 fields should cause ParseError.

semantic_test_specs.semantic_intent: Verify that parse_exchange_file uses content-based detection when extension is misleading.
semantic_test_specs.target_constraint: If file extension suggests one format but content is another, function must detect correctly based on content.
semantic_test_specs.expected_failure_mode: The seed implementation uses extension only, so it would treat .txt as TSV and fail, or produce incorrect output.
semantic_test_specs.test_case_description: A file named 'data.txt' containing YAML-formatted data should be parsed correctly as YAML.

output_requirements: Scaled executable cases must expose the robustness requirements against malformed lines and mislabeled extensions.
